summary: Evaluate investment opportunities through fundamental analysis, risk assessment, and portfolio fit analysis with decision support output.

inputs.name: investment_opportunity
inputs.description: Description and data for the investment opportunity being evaluated.

inputs.name: evaluation_criteria
inputs.description: Risk-return criteria, portfolio fit requirements, and hurdle rates.

inputs.name: market_context
inputs.description: Market conditions and comparable investments for context.

outputs.name: investment_analysis
outputs.description: Comprehensive analysis with fundamental and quantitative assessment.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve disclaimers and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is investment analysis support and not personalized investment advice.
Require investment data and evaluation criteria before any analysis is generated.
Mark all analysis as decision support and attach disclaimer before external sharing.
End with named human reviewer handoff; do not claim investment approval.

steps.action: Perform fundamental analysis of the investment opportunity including financial health and growth prospects.
Estimate value using appropriate methodologies and compare to asking price or market value.
Assess investment risks including market, credit, liquidity, and concentration risks.
Compile analysis, valuation, and risk assessment into a decision support recommendation memo.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read investment data, market data, and comparable information.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the recommendation memo when requested.

verification.method: Check fundamental, valuation, and risk analyses are all present.
Check scenario analysis covers base, upside, and downside cases.
Check output includes not-investment-advice disclaimer and reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The evaluation covers fundamental analysis, valuation, and risk assessment.
Scenarios are included with explicit assumptions for each case.
The final output explicitly states it is not investment advice and requires human review before any investment decision.

rollback.when: If analysis is incomplete or unsupported, revert to the relevant step and regenerate.
